run_intent: Prepare the first Ghost Forge / render batch that makes the current blockout pop using the five highest-impact 2D imagery assets.

external_execution.reason: Repo cockpit currently forbids Ghost Forge runs, image generation, and paid provider calls until Ben clears the human gate.
external_execution.required_gate_to_run: Explicit Ben approval for Ghost Forge/image generation/provider execution plus any spend or provider-account action.

house_style.name: Oddly Godly
house_style.executable_prompt_prefix: Oddly Godly: wet Atlanta night, modern urban fantasy, grounded lived-in grimy realism, cinematic high-detail PBR material quality, sodium-orange streetlight warmth against abyss-blue and teal shadow, abyss-blue Goop with teal-cyan glow and firework-ember magic, grotesque horror-comedy edge.
house_style.style_translation_note: The shopping list's franchise lineage is translated into generic visual goals for executable prompts so the run does not ask for copied game styles or protected characters.
house_style.global_negative_prompt: No real brand logos, no readable real-world text, no celebrity likeness, no copied game UI or HUD, no recognizable existing-game monsters or characters, no real license plates, no watermark, no signature, no border, fictional marks only.

assets.title: Wet asphalt, sodium-lit
assets.target_use: Primary street material under night lighting
assets.prompt: Oddly Godly: wet Atlanta night, modern urban fantasy, grounded lived-in grimy realism, cinematic high-detail PBR material quality, sodium-orange streetlight warmth against abyss-blue and teal shadow, abyss-blue Goop with teal-cyan glow and firework-ember magic, grotesque horror-comedy edge. Seamless tileable wet asphalt surface, dark rain-soaked road, shallow puddling, oil sheen, fine gravel aggregate, faint fictional lane-paint ghosting, sodium streetlight reflections, subtle abyss-blue shadow in cracks, realistic micro-scratches and tire polish, no curb, no cars, no people, no perspective camera. Output a square seamless PBR surface texture with albedo plus height and roughness cues.
assets.negative_prompt: No real brand logos, no readable real-world text, no celebrity likeness, no copied game UI or HUD, no recognizable existing-game monsters or characters, no real license plates, no watermark, no signature, no border, fictional marks only. Avoid obvious seams, repeating stamp patterns, clean new pavement, daytime lighting, readable road text, vehicle parts, sidewalks, buildings, or camera depth.
acceptance_checks: Tiles seamlessly on all edges
Reads as wet asphalt at game camera distance
Contains sodium-orange highlight warmth and abyss-blue shadow
No readable real-world text or brand mark

assets.title: Goop residue overlay
assets.target_use: Signature Oddly Godly layer over streets, walls, and props
assets.prompt: Oddly Godly: wet Atlanta night, modern urban fantasy, grounded lived-in grimy realism, cinematic high-detail PBR material quality, sodium-orange streetlight warmth against abyss-blue and teal shadow, abyss-blue Goop with teal-cyan glow and firework-ember magic, grotesque horror-comedy edge. Seamless translucent abyss-blue and teal-cyan organic residue film, wet viscous streaks, thin oily membranes, branching hand-smear shapes, embedded firework-magenta ember flecks, subtle bioluminescent rim, designed as a reusable overlay that can sit on asphalt, concrete, brick, or metal. Output square tileable overlay with alpha/opacity intent and emissive-mask intent.
assets.negative_prompt: No real brand logos, no readable real-world text, no celebrity likeness, no copied game UI or HUD, no recognizable existing-game monsters or characters, no real license plates, no watermark, no signature, no border, fictional marks only. Avoid creature faces, tentacle characters, readable symbols, hard black background baked into the asset, dry paint, candy colors, and obvious pattern seams.
acceptance_checks: Distinctly signature Goop, not generic slime
Works as translucent layer over multiple materials
Has teal-cyan Goop and magenta ember accents
No recognizable creature or IP-derived form

assets.title: Wet puddle decals
assets.target_use: Streetlight reflection pools and scene wetness
assets.prompt: Oddly Godly: wet Atlanta night, modern urban fantasy, grounded lived-in grimy realism, cinematic high-detail PBR material quality, sodium-orange streetlight warmth against abyss-blue and teal shadow, abyss-blue Goop with teal-cyan glow and firework-ember magic, grotesque horror-comedy edge. Transparent decal atlas of 3 to 4 irregular wet puddles for asphalt and sidewalk projection, subtle ripple rings, oil-sheen edge, sodium-orange highlight streaks, abyss-blue shadow cores, believable rainwater shapes, isolated decals with clean alpha and no baked ground surface.
assets.negative_prompt: No real brand logos, no readable real-world text, no celebrity likeness, no copied game UI or HUD, no recognizable existing-game monsters or characters, no real license plates, no watermark, no signature, no border, fictional marks only. Avoid full background textures, rectangular patches, obvious repeated blobs, fish-eye reflections, objects reflected in the puddles, or readable signs.
acceptance_checks: Transparent isolated puddle shapes
At least three usable variants
Works on dark asphalt without a visible rectangular edge
Includes warm streetlight reflection and cool shadow

assets.title: Goop splatter and residue decals
assets.target_use: Goop drips, pools, hand smears, and ember sparks
assets.prompt: Oddly Godly: wet Atlanta night, modern urban fantasy, grounded lived-in grimy realism, cinematic high-detail PBR material quality, sodium-orange streetlight warmth against abyss-blue and teal shadow, abyss-blue Goop with teal-cyan glow and firework-ember magic, grotesque horror-comedy edge. Transparent decal atlas of 5 to 6 abyss-blue Goop splatters, drips, small pools, dragged hand-smears, and thin residue streaks, teal-cyan wet glow, firework-magenta ember sparks embedded in the fluid, high contrast edges for readable projection decals, isolated on alpha with no background.
assets.negative_prompt: No real brand logos, no readable real-world text, no celebrity likeness, no copied game UI or HUD, no recognizable existing-game monsters or characters, no real license plates, no watermark, no signature, no border, fictional marks only. Avoid cartoon slime, monster anatomy, readable runes, real graffiti tags, symmetrical icons, and hard rectangular backing.
acceptance_checks: At least five distinct decal shapes
Transparent alpha isolation
Clearly abyss-blue/teal Goop with ember flecks
Not a creature, logo, or readable symbol

assets.title: Goop firework burst
assets.target_use: Signature magic pop for Niagara-style burst effect
assets.variant_count: 2-3 burst variants if provider supports batch variants
assets.prompt: Oddly Godly: wet Atlanta night, modern urban fantasy, grounded lived-in grimy realism, cinematic high-detail PBR material quality, sodium-orange streetlight warmth against abyss-blue and teal shadow, abyss-blue Goop with teal-cyan glow and firework-ember magic, grotesque horror-comedy edge. Power-of-two 8x8 VFX flipbook frame sheet showing a Goop firework burst: abyss-blue core eruption, teal-cyan liquid-energy petals, firework-magenta spark trails, ember fragments, fast explosive opening into dissipating wet luminous mist, isolated on transparent alpha, suitable for a game particle system. Keep each frame centered and evenly spaced in the grid.
assets.negative_prompt: No real brand logos, no readable real-world text, no celebrity likeness, no copied game UI or HUD, no recognizable existing-game monsters or characters, no real license plates, no watermark, no signature, no border, fictional marks only. Avoid anime character silhouettes, magic circles with readable text, UI icons, full scene backgrounds, off-grid frames, nontransparent backing, and copyrighted monster shapes.
acceptance_checks: 8x8 flipbook grid with 64 readable frames
Transparent alpha intent
Burst reads as Goop plus fireworks, not generic explosion
Centered frames with no UI or character silhouette
